The question asks about the position of a former Major League Baseball player who worked on the same broadcast team as Kim Kelch. 

From the context, Kim Kelch is described as a broadcaster for the Cincinnati Reds and that he joined the Reds broadcast team in 2010. The context also mentions that joining Kelch on the broadcast team for the Reds are Marty Brennaman, Thom Brennaman, Chris Welsh, George Grande, and, occasionally, Sean Casey.

Sean Casey is identified as a former Major League Baseball first baseman who was selected to the Major League Baseball All-Star Game three times and is currently a broadcaster for the MLB Network.

Therefore, the former Major League Baseball player who worked on the same broadcast team as Kim Kelch is **first baseman**.

**Answer:** The former Major League Baseball player who worked on the same broadcast team as Kim Kelch played the position of **first baseman**.
